warnings: ALLOW_LIVE_TRADING is false, so live orders are still disabled.
FUNDER_ADDRESS is blank. This is commonly needed for custodial/email/social Polymarket wallets and may also be used in some signer setups.
next_steps: Export or create the private key you will use for signing.
If your wallet is custodial or Magic/social based, add FUNDER_ADDRESS to .env.
Generate or copy your Polymarket L2 API credentials into .env.
Install py-clob-client locally before enabling live execution.
Keep ALLOW_LIVE_TRADING=false until dry runs look correct, then flip it deliberately.
